description: A single RED finding becomes one brief item with accept/counter/walk, a quoted clause, and ready_to_send false.

findings.point: perpetual worldwide license for a flat fee
findings.evidence_text: Creator grants Brand a perpetual, worldwide, royalty-free license.

expect.header: starts with RESEARCH NOTES. NOT LEGAL ADVICE.
expect.items: one item with options.accept, options.counter, options.walk and quoted evidence_text

description: When the brand states a response deadline, decide_by uses it and decide_by_source is brand_stated.

findings.evidence_text: Creator will not work with competing brands indefinitely.

expect.items: counter option proposes a bounded exclusivity window in plain language

description: No flagged findings returns a note, not a fabricated escalation.
Every brief carries the consequential-action note and human_review_required true.

findings.point: no kill fee on a cancellable scope
findings.evidence_text: Brand may cancel at any time before publication.

expect.consequential_action_note: present, states legal and financial consequences
